const FAQ = [ { cat: 'getting-started', q: 'How do I create a new workspace?', a: 'Click your avatar in the top right, choose Account settings, then Workspaces → New workspace. You can be a member of multiple workspaces.' }, { cat: 'getting-started', q: 'How do I invite team members?', a: 'Go to Settings → Team → + Invite member. You can invite by email or share a workspace invite link.' }, { cat: 'getting-started', q: 'What\'s the difference between a project and a board?', a: 'A project is a long-lived workspace for a body of work. A board is a Kanban view inside a project. One project can have multiple boards.' }, { cat: 'billing', q: 'How do I change my billing plan?', a: 'Go to Settings → Billing → Change plan. Upgrades are prorated to the current cycle; downgrades take effect at the next renewal.' }, { cat: 'billing', q: 'Can I get an invoice for past months?', a: 'Yes — under Settings → Billing → Recent invoices there\'s a Download button next to every paid invoice.' }, { cat: 'billing', q: 'Do you support purchase orders?', a: 'Annual plans on the Enterprise tier support PO billing. Contact sales to set this up.' }, { cat: 'security', q: 'How do I enable two-factor authentication?', a: 'Go to Settings → Privacy & security and toggle Two-factor authentication on. We support TOTP apps like 1Password, Authy, and Google Authenticator.' }, { cat: 'security', q: 'Where can I see my active sessions?', a: 'Under Settings → Privacy & security → Active sessions you can see every signed-in device and revoke access to any of them.' }, { cat: 'security', q: 'Do you support SSO / SAML?', a: 'SSO is included on the Enterprise plan with SAML 2.0 support for Okta, Google Workspace, Azure AD, and JumpCloud.' }, { cat: 'api', q: 'Where do I find my API key?', a: 'Go to Settings → API keys to create new keys. Each key is shown once at creation time and not stored anywhere we can retrieve later.' }, { cat: 'api', q: 'What are the API rate limits?', a: 'Free: 60 req/min · Pro: 600 req/min · Enterprise: custom. Burst limits apply per endpoint.' }, { cat: 'api', q: 'Do you have webhooks?', a: 'Yes — configure them under Settings → Integrations → Webhooks. We sign every payload with HMAC-SHA256.' }, { cat: 'account', q: 'How do I change my email address?', a: 'In Settings → Account change the email field and save. We\'ll send a confirmation link to the new address.' }, { cat: 'account', q: 'How do I delete my account?', a: 'Settings → Danger zone → Delete account. This is irreversible and removes all your data after a 30-day grace period.' }, { cat: 'account', q: 'Can I transfer workspace ownership?', a: 'Yes — Settings → Danger zone → Transfer ownership. The new owner must already be a member of the workspace.' } ]; let activeCat = 'all'; let openIdx = -1; function escapeHtml(s) { return String(s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, (c) => ({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c])); } function render() { const q = document.getElementById('faq-search').value.trim().toLowerCase(); const filtered = FAQ .map((item, idx) => ({ ...item, idx })) .filter((item) => activeCat === 'all' || item.cat === activeCat) .filter((item) => !q || item.q.toLowerCase().includes(q) || item.a.toLowerCase().includes(q)); const list = document.getElementById('faq-list'); const empty = document.getElementById('faq-empty'); if (!filtered.length) { list.innerHTML = ''; empty.hidden = false; } else { empty.hidden = true; list.innerHTML = filtered.map((item) => `
${item.a}
`).join(''); } } document.getElementById('faq-cats').addEventListener('click', (e) => { const btn = e.target.closest('.chip'); if (!btn) return; e.stopPropagation(); document.querySelectorAll('#faq-cats .chip').forEach((b) => b.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); activeCat = btn.dataset.cat; openIdx = -1; render(); }); document.getElementById('faq-list').addEventListener('click', (e) => { const item = e.target.closest('.faq-item'); if (!item) return; const idx = parseInt(item.dataset.idx, 10); openIdx = openIdx === idx ? -1 : idx; render(); }); let searchTimer; document.getElementById('faq-search').addEventListener('input', () => { clearTimeout(searchTimer); searchTimer = setTimeout(render, 120); }); render();
